summary: Comprehensive testing of ApnaGhr Admin Features - Property Analytics, ToLet Tasks, Visit Approvals, Payouts, Live Tracking, and Notifications. All 51 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all admin tabs working correctly.

minor.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when creating new wallet - FIXED by adding wallet.pop('_id', None) after insert

issues: Some property images show broken image placeholder (house for rent in bathinda) - image URLs may be invalid

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all admin tabs and customer view working)

seed_data_creation: Test ToLet tasks created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin features tested and working: 1) Property Analytics with summary stats, filters (All/Needs Check/Hot/Available/Rented), daily verification modal, hot marking, auto-mark hot, 2) ToLet Tasks with create/assign/update rate, 3) Visit Approvals with approve/reject and wallet credit, 4) Payouts with bi-weekly processing and rider wallets, 5) Live Tracking with online riders and GPS, 6) Notifications dropdown. Customer view shows Hot Property badges (🔥 High Demand) and weekly visits (👀 X viewed this week).

features_tested.property_analytics_panel: PASS - Summary stats, filters, property list with analytics
features_tested.daily_status_verification: PASS - Modal with Available/Rented/Under Verification options
features_tested.hot_property_system: PASS - Mark/unmark hot, auto-mark based on visits
features_tested.customer_hot_badges: PASS - High Demand badge and weekly visits displayed
features_tested.tolet_tasks: PASS - Create task, assign to rider, editable rate
features_tested.visit_approvals: PASS - Review completed visits, approve/reject with wallet credit
features_tested.payouts: PASS - View rider wallets, process bi-weekly payouts
features_tested.live_tracking: PASS - View online riders with GPS location
features_tested.notifications: PASS - Admin gets alerts, mark as read

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in /api/rider/wallet endpoint
bug_fixed.root_cause: When creating a new wallet, MongoDB adds _id to the dict, which is not JSON serializable
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added wallet.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() in get_rider_wallet function
